_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of collection searching/analyzing techniques and tools.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the systems and methods used to collect, store, and maintain each type.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.541), AI-K-020 (AI, cosine: 0.523).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.545). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [analyzing, collection, searching, techniques, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, operational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.898, R=0.865). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.3%). "Knowledge of collection searching/analyzing techniques and tools." and "Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.571 ≈ STS 0.545 (gap 0.025). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [analyzing, collection, searching, techniques, tools]. WIDAI-only: [business, collect, maintain, metadata, methods, operational].
